title: Challenge library
description: A collection of exciting and varied Minecraft challenges, including an In-game Selection Menu, Full Multiplayer Support, and more!
body:
# Challenge Library

Challenge Library is a modular challenge mod for Fabric that adds fast, high-pressure gameplay for singleplayer and multiplayer worlds.

Create custom challenge runs in seconds, combine compatible challenges, switch to random challenge rotations, generate challenge maps, and manage everything in-game.

## Note:

This is **not a library or API mod.**

It is a standalone Minecraft mod that directly adds new in-game challenges and does not require any additional dependencies beyond the standard mod loader.

## Why Challenge Library?

- Fast setup with no complicated configuration
- Multiple challenge modes in one clean system
- In-game selection, descriptions, and session controls
- Random challenge rotation for endless variety
- Challenge maps for structured custom worlds
- Multiplayer-ready challenge flow
- Great for challenge videos, streams, and SMP events

## Features

- In-game challenge menu with descriptions
- Select **multiple challenges** with compatibility checks
- Random Challenge Mode with selectable challenge pools
- Configurable random switch intervals
- Challenge Maps menu for map-based challenge worlds
- One Chunk map generation directly from the mod
- Full settings menu with general, timer, UI, and data tabs
- Start, stop, and resume challenge sessions
- Synced session flow for multiplayer
- Clear feedback via chat, actionbar, and HUD
- Persistent config and session state
- Localization: English and German

## Included Challenges

- **One Inventory Slot**  
  Only the first hotbar slot and offhand are usable.

- **New Chunk, Random Mob**  
  Entering a new chunk can trigger a random mob encounter.

- **Find The Item, Or Die**  
  A timed target item must be found before the timer ends.

- **Don't Stop Moving**  
  Standing still too long causes lethal damage.

- **Block Drop Randomizer**  
  Blocks drop randomized items, consistent per world and dimension.

- **Mob Drop Randomizer**  
  Mob drops are randomized by mob type.

- **Changing Gravity**  
  Gravity changes over time.

- **No Jumping**  
  Jumping is fully disabled.

- **Ultra Fog**  
  Visibility is heavily reduced.

- **Ultra Hardcore**  
  No natural regeneration; death is heavily punishing.

- **Block Cooldown**  
  Blocks can only be placed after a cooldown.

- **Higher Level, Bigger Border**  
  The world border grows as you level up.

- **Nether Start**  
  Start your challenge run in the Nether.

- **Name & Texture Shuffle**  
  Minecraft names and textures are shuffled for a chaotic twist.

## Commands

`/challenge select <id>`  
`/challenge start`  
`/challenge stop`  
`/challenge status`  
`/challenge describe <id>`

## Multiplayer

Challenge Library is designed for co-op and SMP challenge runs:

- Shared pressure and consequences
- Synchronized challenge state
- Great for events and creator challenges
- Works well with random challenge rotations and map-based runs

## Development Status

Challenge Library is in active development.

More challenges, balancing updates, random mode improvements, challenge maps, and new gameplay features are planned for upcoming versions.

## Requirements

- **Minecraft:** `>= 26.1.2`
- **Fabric Loader:** `>= 0.19.1`
- **Fabric API:** required
- **Java:** `>= 25`
